case_title: DANIELE ANDREWS VS. CORDELIA F HAMPTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DANIELE ANDREWS AND DEFENDANT CORDELIA F. HAMPTON. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANDREWS, DANIELE AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, CORDELIA F ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREWS, DANIELE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY ANDREWS, DANIELE HAMPTON, CORDELIA F

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREWS, DANIELE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMPTON, CORDELIA F $342.22 PRINCIPAL, $6.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $348.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
